title: Welltower (WELL) to Dissolve Chartwell JV & Acquire 23 Assets
text: Welltower (WELL) enters into an agreement to dissolve Chartwell JV and acquire the remaining interests in 23 senior housing assets. The move is expected to unlock significant NOI upside, thus making it prudent.

title: 7 Must-Own Retirement Stocks for Millennial Investors

title: Welltower Announces Public Offering Price of 17,500,000 Shares of Common Stock
text: TOLEDO, Ohio , Nov. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Welltower Inc. (NYSE: WELL) ("Welltower" or the "Company") announced today that it priced the public offering for the 17,500,000 shares of its common stock previously sold (the "Offering") to BofA Securities, Inc. and Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC for aggregate gross proceeds to Welltower of approximately $1.5 billion. Welltower has also granted the underwriters an option to purchase up to 2,625,000 additional shares of common stock.

title: Welltower Announces Sale of 17,500,000 Shares of Common Stock
text: TOLEDO, Ohio , Nov. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Welltower Inc. (NYSE: WELL) ("Welltower" or the "Company") announced today the sale (the "Offering") of 17,500,000 shares of its common stock to BofA Securities, Inc. and Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC in an underwritten public offering pursuant to its effective shelf registration statement previously filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC"). Welltower has also granted the underwriters an option to purchase up to 2,625,000 additional shares of common stock.
